macro.takeaway: The US economy bounced back strongly after a weak end to 2025, though rising inflation means the Fed is staying cautious with rates.

source.name: US Bureau of Economic Analysis — GDP Advance Estimate Q1 2026

gold.takeaway: Gold is trading well above last year's levels as investors seek safety amid the Middle East conflict and a weaker US dollar.

source.name: World Gold Council — Gold Demand Trends Q1 2026

china.headline_number: CSI 300 Index: 4,112 (Apr 30); China Q1 GDP: +5.0% year-on-year
china.takeaway: China's economy grew faster than expected on strong exports, but Chinese stocks closed for the May Day holiday with markets watching energy costs.

thailand.takeaway: Thailand's stock market held steady near recent highs as the central bank kept rates at 1%, supported by strong tourism recovery.

source.name: Stock Exchange of Thailand — SET Index Overview

us.takeaway: US stocks closed at a new record as strong Big Tech earnings overcame Fed uncertainty, but high inflation means rate cuts are not coming soon.

source.name: CNBC — Fed holds rates steady, most divided vote since 1992
